From the garden homes near Avenue U to properties along Gerritsen Avenue, we've helped countless Marine Park residents reclaim their yards and outdoor spaces from aggressive hornets.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Marine Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in Marine Park, Brooklyn. Our team understands that hornets pose an immediate threat, so we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours to safely eliminate the nest and treat the area.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, safe disposal of the nest, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Marine Park during certain seasons?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornet activity peaks in Marine Park from late spring through early fall (May to October). During these months, queens establish new colonies in eaves, trees, and attics throughout the neighborhood. Early detection and removal are crucial to prevent nests from growing larger and more dangerous.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in my Marine Park home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. Our technicians will advise you to keep children and pets indoors during the treatment process, and the area is typically safe for normal activity within a few hours after service completion.
